fields.Front: Have you ever slept in the loft?
fields.Back: Apakah kamu pernah tidur di loteng?

fields.Front: I am currently cleaning the loft
fields.Back: Aku sedang membersihkan loteng sekarang

fields.Front: He is not too clingy anymore now
fields.Back: Dia tidak terlalu manja lagi sekarang

fields.Front: Will I seem clingy in front of you?
fields.Back: Aku akan terlihat manja di depanmu?

fields.Front: That building is an old colonial heritage
fields.Back: Bangunan itu merupakan peninggalan kolonial lama

fields.Front: That building is not finished being built yet
fields.Back: Bangunan itu belum selesai dibangun sekarang

fields.Front: Does this feel like heaven to you?
fields.Back: Apakah ini terasa seperti surga bagimu?

fields.Front: That layer of ice is very thin this morning
fields.Back: Lapisan es itu sangat tipis pagi ini

fields.Front: I still cannot help you today
fields.Back: Aku belum bisa bantu kamu hari ini

fields.Front: Let me handle this later
fields.Back: Biar aku yang urus ini nanti

fields.Front: I am not sure he will come
fields.Back: Aku tidak yakin dia akan datang

fields.Front: Why does this task feel very difficult?
fields.Back: Kenapa tugas ini terasa sangat susah?

fields.Front: I already spoke honestly earlier
fields.Back: Aku sudah ngomong jujur tadi

fields.Front: I still don’t understand the meaning until now
fields.Back: Aku belum ngerti maksudnya sampai sekarang

fields.Front: That cat was not fat at all before
fields.Back: Kucing itu dulu tidak gendut sama sekali

fields.Front: I need a pause before continuing to talk
fields.Back: Aku butuh jeda sebelum lanjut bicara

fields.Front: Please play that music again later
fields.Back: Tolong putar musik itu lagi nanti

fields.Front: I am learning to manage time better
fields.Back: Aku sedang belajar kelola waktu lebih baik

fields.Front: He already rejected that offer yesterday
fields.Back: Dia sudah tolak tawaran itu kemarin

fields.Front: Try to stay calm when the situation is chaotic
fields.Back: Coba tetap tenang saat situasi kacau

fields.Front: I will stay calm facing this problem
fields.Back: Aku akan tetap tenang menghadapi masalah ini

fields.Front: This device is not yet connected to the network
fields.Back: Perangkat ini belum terkoneksi ke jaringan

fields.Front: Will this network be stable later tonight?
fields.Back: Apakah jaringan ini akan stabil malam nanti?

fields.Front: That old device can no longer be used
fields.Back: Perangkat lama itu tidak bisa digunakan lagi

fields.Front: His condition became stable after yesterday’s treatment
fields.Back: Kondisinya sudah stabil setelah perawatan kemarin

fields.Front: I am undergoing routine treatment this month
fields.Back: Aku sedang menjalani perawatan rutin bulan ini

fields.Front: Have you been exercising regularly lately?
fields.Back: Apakah kamu sudah rutin olahraga akhir-akhir ini?

fields.Front: I rarely get enough sleep lately
fields.Back: Aku jarang tidur cukup akhir-akhir ini

fields.Front: They will build a new house next year
fields.Back: Mereka akan membangun rumah baru tahun depan

fields.Front: I had not woken up until noon earlier
fields.Back: Aku belum bangun sampai siang tadi

fields.Front: I will not build the business alone
fields.Back: Aku tidak akan membangun bisnis sendirian

fields.Front: Did you wake up early this morning?
fields.Back: Apakah kamu sudah bangun pagi tadi?

fields.Front: That small business has not grown well yet
fields.Back: Bisnis kecil itu belum berkembang dengan baik

fields.Front: Can this idea develop further?
fields.Back: Apakah ide ini bisa berkembang lebih jauh?

fields.Front: He will be blunt about that issue later
fields.Back: Dia akan blak-blakan soal masalah itu nanti

fields.Front: Is he always blunt when angry?
fields.Back: Apakah dia selalu blak-blakan saat marah?

fields.Front: I already handled all the documents earlier
fields.Back: Aku sudah urus semua dokumen tadi

fields.Front: This is a big opportunity for us
fields.Back: Ini merupakan kesempatan besar bagi kita

fields.Front: That architectural style is not modern colonial
fields.Back: Gaya arsitektur itu bukan kolonial modern

fields.Front: I want to change my hairstyle tomorrow
fields.Back: Aku ingin ubah gaya rambut besok

fields.Front: My hair is not dry yet after showering earlier
fields.Back: Rambutku belum kering setelah mandi tadi

fields.Front: I was showering when you called
fields.Back: Aku sedang mandi saat kamu menelepon

fields.Front: Those clothes have been dry since morning
fields.Back: Pakaian itu sudah kering sejak pagi

fields.Front: I have never seen a wild elephant in person
fields.Back: Aku belum pernah melihat gajah liar langsung

fields.Front: He answered directly without thinking long
fields.Back: Dia langsung menjawab tanpa berpikir lama

fields.Front: That layer of paint is not fully dry yet
fields.Back: Lapisan cat itu belum kering sempurna

fields.Front: The result is not perfect but good enough
fields.Back: Hasilnya tidak sempurna tapi cukup baik

fields.Front: I will paint the bedroom wall tomorrow
fields.Back: Aku akan cat dinding kamar besok

fields.Front: That room has not been cleaned since yesterday
fields.Back: Kamar itu belum dibersihkan sejak kemarin

fields.Front: Has this bathroom been cleaned?
fields.Back: Apakah kamar mandi ini sudah dibersihkan?

fields.Front: I did not understand the meaning of your question earlier
fields.Back: Aku tidak paham maksud pertanyaanmu tadi

fields.Front: That wall will be repainted next week
fields.Back: Dinding itu akan dicat ulang minggu depan

fields.Front: Earlier I forgot to bring my wallet to the office
fields.Back: Tadi aku lupa membawa dompet ke kantor

fields.Front: That house was repainted last month
fields.Back: Rumah itu sudah dicat ulang bulan lalu

fields.Front: I have to repeat that practice tomorrow
fields.Back: Aku harus ulang latihan itu besok

fields.Front: He never practices before the match
fields.Back: Dia tidak pernah latihan sebelum pertandingan

fields.Front: I have not found something the same like that
fields.Back: Aku belum menemukan yang sama seperti itu

fields.Front: I will go back to bed later
fields.Back: Aku akan kembali ke tempat tidur nanti

fields.Front: Only one person has not arrived yet
fields.Back: Hanya satu orang yang belum datang

fields.Front: I bought a rare book yesterday
fields.Back: Aku membeli sebuah buku langka kemarin

fields.Front: Opportunities like this are very rare now
fields.Back: Kesempatan seperti ini sangat langka sekarang

fields.Front: He does not want to live like before again
fields.Back: Dia tidak ingin hidup seperti dulu lagi

fields.Front: We have not agreed about that plan yet
fields.Back: Kami belum sepakat tentang rencana itu

fields.Front: Finally we agreed after a long discussion
fields.Back: Akhirnya kami sepakat setelah diskusi panjang

fields.Front: That discussion did not go smoothly yesterday
fields.Back: Diskusi itu tidak berjalan lancar kemarin

fields.Front: Do you know about the new rule changes?
fields.Back: Apakah kamu tahu tentang perubahan aturan baru?

fields.Front: That change has not been clearly felt by everyone
fields.Back: Perubahan itu belum terasa jelas bagi semua orang

fields.Front: All those plans will succeed if consistent
fields.Back: Semua rencana itu akan berhasil jika konsisten

fields.Front: I still cannot consistently maintain a new habit
fields.Back: Aku belum bisa konsisten menjaga kebiasaan baru

fields.Front: That bad habit has slowly changed
fields.Back: Kebiasaan buruk itu sudah berubah perlahan

fields.Front: Today's weather is not as bad as yesterday
fields.Back: Cuaca hari ini tidak seburuk kemarin

fields.Front: Will that decision have a bad impact later?
fields.Back: Apakah keputusan itu akan berdampak buruk nanti?

fields.Front: That decision has not had a big impact so far
fields.Back: Keputusan itu belum berdampak besar sejauh ini

fields.Front: So far I have not seen real results
fields.Back: Sejauh ini aku belum melihat hasil nyata

fields.Front: That problem feels real to many people
fields.Back: Masalah itu terasa nyata bagi banyak orang

fields.Front: I feel comfortable living here now
fields.Back: Aku merasa nyaman tinggal di sini sekarang

fields.Front: He no longer lives in that city
fields.Back: Dia tidak tinggal di kota itu lagi

fields.Front: I will also go with them
fields.Back: Aku juga akan ikut pergi bersama mereka

fields.Front: He reads a book and writes notes tonight
fields.Back: Dia membaca buku dan menulis catatan malam ini

fields.Front: He has worked as a teacher since last year
fields.Back: Dia bekerja sebagai guru sejak tahun lalu

fields.Front: I want to become more patient going forward
fields.Back: Aku ingin menjadi lebih sabar ke depannya

fields.Front: This is a choice that is not easy
fields.Back: Ini adalah pilihan yang tidak mudah

fields.Front: I was late because of heavy traffic earlier
fields.Back: Aku terlambat karena macet parah tadi

fields.Front: The damage is not severe after that incident
fields.Back: Kerusakannya belum parah setelah kejadian itu

fields.Front: Do you remember that incident last night?
fields.Back: Apakah kamu ingat kejadian itu semalam?

fields.Front: The damage is not visible from outside the house
fields.Back: Kerusakannya tidak terlihat dari luar rumah

fields.Front: I still remember his face until now
fields.Back: Aku masih ingat wajahnya sampai sekarang

fields.Front: You did not remember that promise yesterday
fields.Back: Kamu tidak ingat janji itu kemarin

fields.Front: Do you remember the way there?
fields.Back: Apakah kamu ingat jalan ke sana?

fields.Front: I will remember your advice forever
fields.Back: Aku akan ingat nasihatmu selamanya

fields.Front: He has not remembered my friend's name earlier
fields.Back: Dia belum ingat nama temanku tadi

fields.Front: We rarely remember small details like that
fields.Back: Kami jarang ingat detail kecil seperti itu

fields.Front: Remember to bring the keys before leaving
fields.Back: Ingat untuk membawa kunci sebelum keluar

fields.Front: I once remembered that song clearly
fields.Back: Aku pernah ingat lagu itu dengan jelas

fields.Front: Why do you not remember that meeting?
fields.Back: Mengapa kamu tidak ingat pertemuan itu?

fields.Front: He will remember this moment his whole life
fields.Back: Dia akan ingat momen ini sepanjang hidupnya

fields.Front: I did not recognize that face earlier
fields.Back: Aku tidak mengenali wajah itu tadi

fields.Front: I will follow your advice starting tomorrow
fields.Back: Aku akan mengikuti nasihatmu mulai besok

fields.Front: Have you checked the details of this order?
fields.Back: Apakah kamu sudah memeriksa detail pesanan ini?

fields.Front: He has not left the room since earlier
fields.Back: Dia belum keluar dari ruangan sejak tadi

fields.Front: That song is being played on the radio now
fields.Back: Lagu itu sedang diputar di radio sekarang

fields.Front: That moment feels very meaningful to me
fields.Back: Momen itu terasa sangat berarti bagiku

fields.Front: Throughout today I did not feel tired
fields.Back: Sepanjang hari ini aku tidak merasa lelah

fields.Front: I did not recognize his voice on the phone earlier
fields.Back: Aku tidak mengenali suaranya di telepon tadi

fields.Front: This order has not been sent until now
fields.Back: Pesanan ini belum dikirim sampai sekarang

fields.Front: Does that gift truly mean something to you?
fields.Back: Apakah hadiah itu benar-benar berarti bagimu?

fields.Front: I need time to think about this
fields.Back: Aku butuh waktu untuk memikirkan ini

fields.Front: You do not need to worry about that
fields.Back: Kamu tidak perlu khawatir tentang hal itu

fields.Front: Will we continue this discussion tomorrow?
fields.Back: Apakah kita akan lanjut diskusi ini besok?

fields.Front: His condition has not improved since last night
fields.Back: Kondisinya belum membaik sejak kemarin malam

fields.Front: That treatment is not suitable for my skin
fields.Back: Perawatan itu tidak cocok untuk kulitku

fields.Front: The quality of this product will improve next year
fields.Back: Kualitas produk ini akan meningkat tahun depan

fields.Front: My skin has not fully recovered after that wound
fields.Back: Kulitku belum pulih sepenuhnya setelah luka itu

fields.Front: He will recover faster with enough rest
fields.Back: Dia akan pulih lebih cepat dengan istirahat cukup

fields.Front: That wound has not healed even though it has been treated
fields.Back: Luka itu belum sembuh meskipun sudah dirawat

fields.Front: I have not fully recovered from that flu
fields.Back: Aku belum sembuh sepenuhnya dari flu itu

fields.Front: That patient is being treated in the hospital now
fields.Back: Pasien itu sedang dirawat di rumah sakit sekarang

fields.Front: I must rest so I recover quickly
fields.Back: Aku harus istirahat agar cepat pulih

fields.Front: He has not left the hospital since the surgery
fields.Back: Dia belum keluar dari rumah sakit sejak operasi

fields.Front: That surgery did not go smoothly yesterday
fields.Back: Operasi itu tidak berjalan lancar kemarin

fields.Front: I did not answer that call earlier
fields.Back: Aku tidak menjawab panggilan itu tadi

fields.Front: Your privacy must always be properly protected
fields.Back: Privasi kamu harus tetap dijaga dengan baik

fields.Front: The situation is not as chaotic as it appears
fields.Back: Situasinya tidak terlalu kacau seperti yang terlihat

fields.Front: Will this situation improve in the near future?
fields.Back: Apakah situasi ini akan membaik dalam waktu dekat?

fields.Front: The result will appear better tomorrow
fields.Back: Hasilnya akan terlihat lebih baik besok

fields.Front: I am already tired from working all day
fields.Back: Aku sudah capek bekerja seharian ini

fields.Front: That boy is not very tall compared to his friend
fields.Back: Cowok itu tidak terlalu tinggi dibanding temannya

fields.Front: Has that girl already left from here?
fields.Back: Apakah cewek itu sudah pergi dari sini?

fields.Front: His condition slowly improves after taking medicine
fields.Back: Kondisinya perlahan membaik setelah minum obat

fields.Front: This price is cheaper compared to the shop next door
fields.Back: Harga ini lebih murah dibanding toko sebelah

fields.Front: That leaf has not fallen from the old tree
fields.Back: Daun itu belum jatuh dari pohon tua

fields.Front: Will that tree grow bigger?
fields.Back: Apakah pohon itu akan tumbuh lebih besar?

fields.Front: That shop is next to my house now
fields.Back: Toko itu berada di sebelah rumahku sekarang

fields.Front: I do not want to split that wood alone
fields.Back: Aku tidak mau belah kayu itu sendirian

fields.Front: That wood has already been cut into several pieces
fields.Back: Kayu itu sudah dipotong menjadi beberapa bagian

fields.Front: This part is not included in the original plan
fields.Back: Bagian ini tidak termasuk dalam rencana awal

fields.Front: The beginning of that story is not very interesting to me
fields.Back: Awal cerita itu tidak terlalu menarik bagiku

fields.Front: Does this cost include additional tax?
fields.Back: Apakah biaya ini termasuk pajak tambahan?

fields.Front: That book was written by that famous author
fields.Back: Does this cost include additional tax?

fields.Front: I want a massage after working all day
fields.Back: Aku ingin pijat setelah kerja seharian ini

fields.Front: That additional fee will be calculated later
fields.Back: Biaya tambahan itu akan dihitung nanti

fields.Front: I have not paid the vehicle tax this year
fields.Back: Aku belum membayar pajak kendaraan tahun ini

fields.Front: The total cost has already been calculated since yesterday
fields.Back: Total biayanya sudah dihitung sejak kemarin

fields.Front: That vehicle is not allowed to park here
fields.Back: Kendaraan itu tidak boleh parkir di sini

fields.Front: I do not want to repeat past mistakes again
fields.Back: Aku tidak ingin mengulang kesalahan lampau lagi

fields.Front: He will not repeat the same mistake
fields.Back: Dia tidak akan mengulang kesalahan yang sama

fields.Front: Is there a possibility we meet again?
fields.Back: Apakah ada kemungkinan kita bertemu lagi?

fields.Front: Today I do not have time to rest
fields.Back: Hari ini aku tidak punya waktu istirahat

fields.Front: How did you manage to solve that problem?
fields.Back: Gimana kamu bisa menyelesaikan masalah itu?

fields.Front: That man does not work here anymore
fields.Back: Pria itu tidak bekerja di sini lagi
